mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_customer ( customer_id, customer_name, cert_type, cert_no, mobile, customer_status, risk_level, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{certType}, #{certNo}, #{mobile}, #{customerStatus}, #{riskLevel}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT customer_id, customer_name, cert_type, cert_no, mobile, customer_status, risk_level, created_time, updated_time FROM t_customer WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, cert_type, cert_no, mobile, customer_status, risk_level, created_time, updated_time FROM t_customer WHERE cert_no = #{certNo}
